Identiverse 2026
NHAI Pavilion Panel: When Agents Create Agents: Identity Explosion and Containment
Back to Main Agenda
Wednesday, June 17
NHAI Pavilion Theater
10:15 am - 10:45 am

Agentic systems don’t scale linearly, they spawn. This session looks at what happens when agents dynamically create other agents, each requiring identity, permissions, and lifecycle management. We’ll discuss identity sprawl, blast radius, revocation challenges, and the limits of today’s provisioning models. Attendees will gain practical insight into how to think about containment, hierarchy, and trust boundaries in agent-driven systems.

stay in touch!
